overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting first-person driving on a rain-soaked futuristic elevated highway. The scene features holographic billboards, neon lighting, moderate vehicle traffic, and cyberpunk architecture with overpasses and barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cyberpunk highway with holographic advertising displays

events.description: decelerating from 60 km/h to 38 km/h while approaching slower traffic ahead

agents.ego_description: driving on multi-lane highway following a yellow taxi, maintaining position in center lane through heavy rain

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights occasionally illuminated

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics and neon text
massive concrete and steel overpass spanning across the highway with support pillars
thick concrete pillar supporting the elevated highway structure above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with first-person driving on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night. Holographic billboards line the left side while the vehicle follows a yellow taxi through moderate traffic. The speed fluctuates as the driver navigates the wet road conditions under the glow of neon advertisements and street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway section with green noise barriers and frequent overpasses

events.description: entering enclosed highway section with green noise barriers replacing open skyline on the right
accelerating to 70 km/h through the enclosed section with reduced wind resistance

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the enclosed highway section, passing under multiple concrete overpasses while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: silver sports car overtaking on the right side at high speed

entered.detail: tall translucent green noise barrier wall running along the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a more enclosed section of highway characterized by green noise barriers on the right and closely spaced overpasses overhead. The lighting becomes more artificial and tunnel-like as the driver accelerates, passing under the massive concrete structures while other vehicles overtake on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway section with dense holographic billboard clusters

events.description: exiting enclosed section back to open highway with holographic billboards visible on both sides
changing lanes to the left to overtake a slower moving vehicle

agents.ego_description: navigating through open highway section, changing lanes to pass slower traffic while holographic advertisements flash on the left

notable_agents.action: black sedan being overtaken on the left side as the ego vehicle changes lanes

entered.detail: returning series of large illuminated advertisement screens displaying vibrant cyberpunk graphics
distant illuminated advertisement visible on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the enclosed section, the highway opens up again revealing clusters of holographic billboards on the left displaying bright advertisements. The driver changes lanes to overtake slower traffic while the rain continues to create reflective patterns on the asphalt surface under the mixed lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to exit with industrial structures and ramp signage

events.description: approaching highway exit ramp with industrial buildings becoming visible on the right horizon
decelerating to 40 km/h while navigating toward the exit ramp area

agents.ego_description: approaching the highway exit while maintaining position behind traffic, industrial buildings visible through the rain on the right

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with red taillights illuminated, slowing down as it approaches the exit

entered.detail: large industrial structure with illuminated windows and smokestacks visible through the rain
overhead highway signage indicating exit directions and lane assignments

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle approaching a highway exit, with industrial buildings replacing the commercial billboards on the right side. The driver decelerates while following traffic toward the exit ramp, passing under the last of the overpass structures as the environment transitions from commercial to industrial architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along a rain-soaked elevated highway that transitions from a neon-lit commercial corridor into a stark industrial zone. It begins by following a yellow taxi through moderate traffic, with holographic billboards casting a glow over the wet asphalt. As the vehicle accelerates, the environment shifts into a more enclosed section characterized by green noise barriers and oppressive concrete overpasses that create a tunnel-like atmosphere. The scene then opens back up into a wide expanse of bright advertisements and reflective road surfaces before the driver changes lanes to overtake slower traffic. Finally, the commercial glow fades as the vehicle decelerates toward a highway exit, passing under the last overpass as the architecture transforms into a landscape of industrial buildings.
